name: Proofpoint TAP
description: Proofpoint Targeted Attack Protection - monitor email threats, targeted attacks, and user click behavior for security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Proofpoint TAP at https://threatinsight.proofpoint.com
2. Go to Settings > Connected Applications
3. Create a new Service Principal (or use an existing one)
4. Copy the Service Principal (username) and Secret (password)
5. Enter them below

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Retrieves all threat events from the past 24 hours via the SIEM endpoint. Reports blocked vs delivered threats. Emits findings for any messages that were delivered despite being threats.

checks.name: Security Awareness
checks.description: Retrieves the Very Attacked People (VAP) list from Proofpoint TAP. Reports on the most targeted users in the organization over a 30-day window.

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Retrieves the top clickers list from Proofpoint TAP. Identifies users who clicked on malicious URLs, enabling incident response and targeted remediation.
